property.name: jar.base.classpath
property.value: ${userguide.jarname} ncIdv-${ncidv.version}.jar external-trimmed-${idv.version}.jar gluegen-rt-${jogamp.version}.jar jogamp-no-natives-${jogamp.version}.jar sysout-over-slf4j-${sysout.version}.jar miglayout-core-${miglayout.version}.jar miglayout-swing-${miglayout.version}.jar eventbus-${eventbus.version}.jar logback-core-${logback.version}.jar logback-classic-${logback.version}.jar log4j-over-slf4j-${slf4j.version}.jar slf4j-api-${slf4j.version}.jar ${local-idv.jarname} commons-math3-${commons-math.version}.jar rsyntaxtextarea-${rsyntaxtextarea.version}.jar jul-to-slf4j-${slf4j.version}.jar local-visad-${idv.version}.jar visad-${visad.version}.jar idv-${idv.version}.jar ${userguide.jarname} JSatTrak-${jsattrack.version}.jar swingx-common-${swingx.version}.jar j3dcore-${java3d.version}.jar j3dutils-${java3d.version}.jar vecmath-${java3d.version}.jar jython-standalone-${jython.version}.jar juniversalchardet-${juniversalchardet.version}.jar commons-httpclient-${commons-httpclient.version}.jar jcodec-javase-${jcodec.version}.jar jcodec-${jcodec.version}.jar flatlaf-${flatlaf.version}-no-natives.jar flatlaf-extras-${flatlaf.version}.jar flatlaf-intellij-themes-${flatlaf.version}.jar flatlaf-swingx-${flatlaf.version}.jar batik-all-${batik.version}.jar batik-anim-${batik.version}.jar batik-awt-util-${batik.version}.jar batik-bridge-${batik.version}.jar batik-codec-${batik.version}.jar batik-constants-${batik.version}.jar batik-css-${batik.version}.jar batik-dom-${batik.version}.jar batik-ext-${batik.version}.jar batik-extension-${batik.version}.jar batik-gui-util-${batik.version}.jar batik-gvt-${batik.version}.jar batik-i18n-${batik.version}.jar batik-parser-${batik.version}.jar batik-script-${batik.version}.jar batik-shared-resources-${batik.version}.jar batik-svg-dom-${batik.version}.jar batik-svgbrowser-${batik.version}.jar batik-svggen-${batik.version}.jar batik-svgrasterizer-${batik.version}.jar batik-swing-${batik.version}.jar batik-test-${batik.version}.jar batik-test-old-${batik.version}.jar batik-test-svg-${batik.version}.jar batik-test-swing-${batik.version}.jar batik-transcoder-${batik.version}.jar batik-util-${batik.version}-tests.jar batik-util-${batik.version}.jar batik-xml-${batik.version}.jar external-trimmed-5.7.jar fop-transcoder-allinone-${fop-xmlgraphics.version}.jar rhino-1.7.15.jar serializer-2.7.3.jar xml-apis-1.4.01.jar xml-apis-ext-1.3.04.jar xmlgraphics-commons-${fop-xmlgraphics.version}.jar commons-collections4-${commons-collections.version}.jar hydra-resources-${hydra.version}.jar gt-geotiff-${geotools.version}.jar gt-coverage-${geotools.version}.jar gt-referencing-${geotools.version}.jar gt-metadata-${geotools.version}.jar gt-api-${geotools.version}.jar jts-core-1.20.0.jar gt-main-${geotools.version}.jar jt-utilities-1.1.31.jar jt-iterators-1.1.31.jar imagen-core-0.9.1.jar si-units-2.1.jar uom-lib-common-2.1.jar unit-api-2.2.jar indriya-2.2.jar systems-common-2.1.jar FastInfoset-1.2.15.jar GeographicLib-Java-1.49.jar affine-0.9.1.jar aircompressor-0.27.jar algebra-0.9.1.jar antlr4-runtime-4.7.1.jar apiguardian-api-1.1.2.jar bandcombine-0.9.1.jar bandmerge-0.9.1.jar bandselect-0.9.1.jar bigint-0.7.1.jar binarize-0.9.1.jar border-0.9.1.jar bson-4.0.6.jar buffer-0.9.1.jar bufr-5.5.3.jar cdm-core-5.5.3.jar classbreaks-0.9.1.jar classifier-0.9.1.jar colorconvert-0.9.1.jar colorindexer-0.9.1.jar commons-beanutils-1.11.0.jar commons-cli-1.4.jar commons-codec-1.11.jar commons-collections-3.2.2.jar commons-collections4-4.4.jar commons-compiler-3.0.8.jar commons-dbcp-1.4.jar commons-digester-1.8.1.jar commons-io-2.19.0.jar commons-jxpath-1.4.0.jar commons-lang3-3.18.0.jar commons-logging-1.3.5.jar commons-pool-1.5.4.jar commons-text-1.13.0.jar concurrent-tile-cache-0.9.1.jar contour-0.9.1.jar convolve-0.9.1.jar crop-0.9.1.jar disruptor-1.2.15.jar eastwood-1.1.1-20090908.jar ehcache-3.4.0.jar ejml-core-0.41.jar ejml-ddense-0.41.jar error_prone_annotations-2.36.0.jar errordiffusion-0.9.1.jar failureaccess-1.0.3.jar format-0.9.1.jar gdal-3.2.0.jar geodb-0.9.jar grib-5.5.3.jar gt-api-34.2.jar gt-app-schema-34.2.jar gt-app-schema-resolver-34.2.jar gt-arcgrid-34.2.jar gt-brewer-34.2.jar gt-charts-34.2.jar gt-complex-34.2.jar gt-coverage-34.2.jar gt-coverage-api-34.2.jar gt-cql-34.2.jar gt-cql2-json-34.2.jar gt-cql2-text-34.2.jar gt-csv-34.2.jar gt-epsg-extension-34.2.jar gt-epsg-hsql-34.2.jar gt-feature-pregeneralized-34.2.jar gt-geojson-core-34.2.jar gt-geopkg-34.2.jar gt-geotiff-34.2.jar gt-gml-geometry-streaming-34.2.jar gt-graph-34.2.jar gt-grassraster-34.2.jar gt-grib-34.2.jar gt-grid-34.2.jar gt-http-34.2.jar gt-http-commons-34.2.jar gt-image-34.2.jar gt-imageio-ext-gdal-34.2.jar gt-imagemosaic-34.2.jar gt-imagepyramid-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-db2-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-h2-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-hana-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-mysql-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-oracle-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-postgis-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-sqlserver-34.2.jar gt-jdbc-teradata-34.2.jar gt-jp2k-34.2.jar gt-main-34.2.jar gt-mbstyle-34.2.jar gt-metadata-34.2.jar gt-mongodb-34.2.jar gt-netcdf-34.2.jar gt-process-34.2.jar gt-process-feature-34.2.jar gt-process-geometry-34.2.jar gt-process-raster-34.2.jar gt-property-34.2.jar gt-referencing-34.2.jar gt-render-34.2.jar gt-sample-data-34.2.jar gt-sample-data-access-34.2.jar gt-shapefile-34.2.jar gt-swing-34.2.jar gt-tile-client-34.2.jar gt-transform-34.2.jar gt-wfs-ng-34.2.jar gt-wms-34.2.jar gt-wmts-34.2.jar gt-xml-34.2.jar gt-xsd-core-34.2.jar gt-xsd-csw-34.2.jar gt-xsd-fes-34.2.jar gt-xsd-filter-34.2.jar gt-xsd-gml2-34.2.jar gt-xsd-gml3-34.2.jar gt-xsd-kml-34.2.jar gt-xsd-ows-34.2.jar gt-xsd-sld-34.2.jar gt-xsd-wcs-34.2.jar gt-xsd-wfs-34.2.jar gt-xsd-wms-34.2.jar gt-xsd-wmts-34.2.jar gt-xsd-wps-34.2.jar gt-ysld-34.2.jar guava-33.4.8-jre.jar h2-1.1.119.jar hatbox-1.0.b11.jar hsqldb-2.7.2.jar httpclient-4.5.14.jar httpcore-4.4.16.jar httpmime-4.5.13.jar httpservices-5.5.3.jar imagefunction-0.9.1.jar imageio-ext-arcgrid-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-cog-commons-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-cog-reader-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-cog-streams-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalarcbinarygrid-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdaldted-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalecw-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalecwjp2-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalehdr-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalenvihdr-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalerdasimg-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalframework-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalidrisi-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalkakadujp2-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalmrsid-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalmrsidjp2-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalnitf-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalrpftoc-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalsrp-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-gdalvrt-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-geocore-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-kakadu-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-kakadujni-5.2.6.jar imageio-ext-streams-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-tiff-2.0.1.jar imageio-ext-utilities-2.0.1.jar imagen-core-0.9.1.jar imageread-0.9.1.jar indriya-2.2.jar istack-commons-runtime-3.0.7.jar iterators-0.9.1.jar j2objc-annotations-3.0.0.jar jackson-annotations-2.19.0.jar jackson-core-2.19.0.jar jackson-databind-2.19.0.jar jakarta.activation-api-1.2.2.jar jakarta.annotation-api-1.3.4.jar jakarta.inject-api-2.0.1.jar jakarta.xml.bind-api-2.3.3.jar janino-3.0.8.jar javax.activation-api-1.2.0.jar jaxb-api-2.4.0-b180830.0359.jar jaxb-runtime-2.4.0-b180830.0438.jar jcc-12.1.0.0.jar jcommander-1.78.jar jcommon-1.0.13.jar jdom2-2.0.6.1.jar jfreechart-1.0.10.jar jgridshift-core-1.3.jar jiffle-language-0.9.1.jar jiffle-op-0.9.1.jar jj2000-5.4.jar jna-5.4.0.jar joda-time-2.10.3.jar json-simple-1.1.1.jar jspecify-1.0.0.jar jsr305-3.0.2.jar jtds-1.3.1.jar jts-core-1.20.0.jar listenablefuture-9999.0-empty-to-avoid-conflict-with-guava.jar lookup-0.9.1.jar miglayout-3.7-swing.jar mongodb-driver-core-4.0.6.jar mongodb-driver-legacy-4.0.6.jar mongodb-driver-sync-4.0.6.jar mosaic-0.9.1.jar mssql-jdbc-13.2.1.jre11.jar mysql-connector-j-9.4.0.jar net.opengis.csw-34.2.jar net.opengis.fes-34.2.jar net.opengis.ows-34.2.jar net.opengis.wcs-34.2.jar net.opengis.wfs-34.2.jar net.opengis.wmts-34.2.jar net.opengis.wps-34.2.jar netcdf4-5.5.3.jar nullop-0.9.1.jar ojdbc17-23.7.0.25.01.jar opencsv-5.0.jar opendap-2.1.jar orderdither-0.9.1.jar org.eclipse.emf.common-2.15.0.jar org.eclipse.emf.ecore-2.15.0.jar org.eclipse.emf.ecore.xmi-2.15.0.jar org.eclipse.xsd-2.12.0.jar org.w3.xlink-34.2.jar picocontainer-1.2.jar piecewise-0.9.1.jar protobuf-java-3.19.3.jar re2j-1.8.jar rendered-image-browser-0.9.1.jar rescale-0.9.1.jar rlookup-0.9.1.jar scale-0.9.1.jar scale2-0.9.1.jar shadedrelief-0.9.1.jar si-quantity-2.1.jar slf4j-api-2.0.16.jar snakeyaml-2.4.jar spotbugs-annotations-4.0.2.jar sqlite-jdbc-3.41.2.2.jar stats-0.9.1.jar stax-ex-1.8.jar translate-0.9.1.jar txw2-2.4.0-b180830.0438.jar udunits-5.5.3.jar utilities-0.9.1.jar vectorbin-0.9.1.jar vectorize-0.9.1.jar warp-0.9.1.jar wiremock-standalone-3.11.0.jar xml-commons-resolver-1.2.jar xmlunit-core-2.10.0.jar xmlunit-matchers-2.9.1.jar zonal-0.9.1.jar

target.name: info
target.description: Print various significant property values

target.name: clean
target.description: Delete all class files and temporary build files

target.name: gitupdate
target.description: Get the latest McIDAS-V source from Github.

target.name: processdocs
target.description: Keep Git up to date with changes that were presumably synced from web server.

target.name: jythondocs
target.description: Generate HTML from McIDAS-V Jython docstrings.

target.name: getidvjars
target.description: Get the latest IDV jar files from Unidata

target.name: getvisadjar
target.description: Get the latest VisAD jar file from SSEC

target.name: copy.build.props
target.description: Set build properties

target.name: copy.nightly.props
target.description: Set nightly build properties

target.name: build
target.description: Build the edu tree

target.name: startupmanager
target.description: Build only the startup manager

target.name: jar.jython
target.description: Create the standalone Jython console jar file

attribute.name: Class-Path
attribute.value: sysout-over-slf4j-1.0.2.jar miglayout-core-4.2.jar miglayout-swing-4.2.jar eventbus-1.4.jar logback-core-1.1.1.jar logback-classic-1.1.1.jar log4j-over-slf4j-1.7.6.jar slf4j-api-1.7.6.jar local-idv.jar commons-math3-3.2.jar rsyntaxtextarea-2.5.1.jar jul-to-slf4j-1.7.6.jar local-idv.jar visad.jar idv.jar repositorytds.jar mcv_userguide.jar

target.name: jar.base
target.description: Jar the base application jar file

target.name: jar.local-idv
target.description: Jar the local-idv jar file

target.name: jar
target.description: Create jar files and documentation

target.name: jar.nightly
target.description: Create nightly jar files and documentation

target.name: signjar
target.description: Create signed jar files

target.name: singlejar
target.description: Include dependencies in single jar file

target.name: dist
target.depends: clean, auxdata.nodocs, jar, ncidv.nolog, external.cleanup, startupmanager, javadoc.jar, userguide.jar
target.description: Create distribution product

target.name: nightly
target.depends: gitupdate, auxdata.nodocs, jar.nightly, startupmanager, ncidv.nolog, external.cleanup, javadoc.jar, userguide.jar, source
target.description: Create nightly webstart distribution product

target.name: jar.run
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (small memory)

target.name: jar.runlarge
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (large memory)

target.name: jar.runlarge.jpms
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (large memory)

target.name: jar.runscript.jpms
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (large memory)

target.name: debug.runlarge
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (large memory)

target.name: debug.runlarge.jpms
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (large memory)

target.name: jar.runscript
target.description: Build McIDAS-V and run a Jython script (large memory).

target.name: run
target.description: Run McIDAS-V application (small memory)

target.name: runlarge
target.description: Run McIDAS-V application (large memory)

target.name: javadoc
target.description: Generate the javadoc documentation

target.name: javadoc.jar
target.description: Create javadoc jar file

target.name: userguide.jar
target.description: Create the userguide jar file

target.name: auxdata.nodocs
target.description: Remove the docs/ directory from auxdata.jar

target.name: ncidv.nolog
target.description: Remove the org/slf4j directory from ncIdv.jar

target.name: external.cleanup
target.description: Remove redundant/unneeded class files from external.jar

target.name: source
target.description: Create source jar file

target.name: packsource
target.description: Move the source file to install4j directory

target.name: installers_normal
target.description: Make the installers with install4j

target.name: installers_macos
target.description: Separate installer task for building on macOS machines

target.name: jenkins_installers
target.description: Create all Install4J installers (place them in dist)

target.name: exe_installers
target.description: TEMPORARY FOR APPSIGN_WINDOWS BRANCH

target.name: installer_custom_code
target.description: Build Install4J custom prefs store.

target.name: archive
target.description: Build McIDAS-V JARs and create mcidasv-tiny.zip and mcidasv-alljars.zip.

target.name: appbundle.clean
target.description: Delete previously built McIDAS-V app bundle (and DMG).

target.name: appbundle.build
target.description: Generate McIDAS-V.app.

target.name: appbundle.sign
target.description: Sign the McIDAS-V application bundle.

fail.message: Please provide a value for bundle.identity: ant -Dbundle.identity='YOUR SIGNING IDENTITY' appbundle.sign

target.name: appbundle.dist
target.description: Package app bundle stuff for distribution.

target.name: memory.profiler
target.description: Starts McIDAS-V and takes a snapshot of performance and memory at shutdown.

target.name: sampling.profiler
target.description: Starts McIDAS-V with CPU sampling (find performance problems)

target.name: tracing.profiler
target.description: Starts McIDAS-V with CPU tracing (look at each method invocation)

target.name: ugh.profiler
target.description: CPU sampling, performance/memory snapshot at shutdown.

target.name: profiler.runlarge
target.description: Build and run McIDAS-V application (large memory)
